title: Buula's Rocky Home
content:

6 [[Laser cannon/Legends|double laser cannons]],
1 [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton-torpedo launcher]] |complement=[[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighters]],
[[Light freighter/Legends|Light freighters]] |bays= |escapepods= |crew=100 |skeleton=20 |passengers=250 |capacity= |cargohandling=variable, normally 50–100 metric tons |consumables=6 months |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] |sector=[[Svivreni sector/Legends|Svivreni sector]] |system=[[Telanka system/Legends|Telanka system]] |coordinates=O-19 |xyz= |orbited=[[Vessar Asteroid Field]] |distance= |routes= |role= |affiliation=[[Buula's Raiders]] |constructed= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |owners=[[Buula Nen]] |namedcrew= |captains= |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} '''Buula's Rocky Home''' was one of the [[Vessar Asteroid Field|Vessar]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in the [[Telanka system/Legends|Telanka system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was home to the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Buula Nen]] and [[Buula's Raiders|his raiders]]. ==Overview== The asteroid base served as Buula's hideout, smuggling hub, base of operations, and primary slave pens. The asteroid base was full of pirates and fringers, all of whom hoped to cash in on Chevin's profitable enterprises. But upon being recruited, they found themselves deep in a game of lies and deceit, one in which Buula held all the cards, maintaining control over his henchmen and associates via threats, violence, and subterfuge. Buula's operations mainly consisted of dirtside raids, employing a small fleet of ships to raid freighters and outposts throughout the Outer Rim. He sold off anything he could, from slaves to cargo to ships. Captives were ransomed and kept isolated in the base's holding rooms, and if they turned out to have no value, they were tossed into the holding pit to be sold to slavers. His hideout was equipped with a main docking bay that had room for three light freighters and a handful of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. It had various rooms and facilities, including a machine ship, a storage room for loot, a shield generator, a medical bay, a communications room, a dozen rooms for the crew, the main power generator, a common room, a guard post, holding rooms, and a holding pit. The asteroid was defended by multiple batteries of remote-controlled surface-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], and a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton-torpedo]] launcher. ==Sources== *''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Asteroid bases]] [[Category:Asteroids in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Pirate bases]] [[Category:Svivreni sector locations]]
